message:
fix(server): harden ATC rhythm tracking, sanitize console output, and DRY screen navigation

atc.rs: Fix AgentRhythm::observe() to ignore out-of-order and duplicate
timestamps instead of clamping deltas to zero. Previously, out-of-order
timestamps produced a delta of 0 which collapsed the running variance
and corrupted the rhythm model. Now, observations where timestamp <=
last_activity_ts are silently dropped and last_activity_ts is kept as the
maximum seen value.

console.rs: Sanitize user-supplied tool_name, project, and agent values
in render_tool_call_start() and render_tool_call_end() using
strip_ansi_content() to prevent terminal escape injection via crafted
MCP tool names or agent identities.

tui_app.rs: Replace the hard-coded match table in
screen_from_palette_action_id() with a parse-and-delegate approach using
screen_id_from_tick_key(). This makes the function case-insensitive and
automatically covers new screens without needing to update a match arm.
Made the function pub(crate) so analytics.rs can reuse it. Add test for
mixed-case screen name parsing.

analytics.rs: Remove duplicated screen name -> MailScreenId match table
from parse_deep_link() and delegate to screen_from_palette_action_id()
from tui_app instead. Add test coverage for attachments and
archive_browser deep links that were previously missing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
